title: dolomiaea salwinensis
intro: Dolomiaea salwinensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Salwin dolomiaea or Dolomiaea. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dolomiaea salwinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Dolomiaea salwinensis can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
